arts.ttl: Diego Simeone calls two Atlético starlets up to training ahead of Lille
arts.sum: Two up-and-coming members of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Atlético Madrid were on Tuesday afforded call-ups to first-team training. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who have provided an…

arts.ttl: Angel Gomes moving closer to Man Utd return
arts.sum: The 24-year-old has become one of Ligue 1's most consistent and impressive midfielders since moving to Lille from Man Utd in 2020. There are no signs to suggest that Angel Gomes will renew his contract with LOSC Lille, according to French media.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid move ahead of Arsenal in race for African teenager?
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid are reportedly ahead of Arsenal in the race for Mali youth international Baye Coulibaly, with the Spanish club submitting a bid for the midfielder.

arts.ttl: LaLiga aim to play Barcelona vs Atletico Madrid clash in Miami before Christmas - despite Fifa stance
arts.sum: The Premier League are no longer looking at overseas games as an option

arts.ttl: Lille’s injury crisis worsens with Mitchel Bakker’s absence
arts.sum: Lille OSC have confirmed that they will be without summer signing Mitchel Bakker (24) for several weeks after he picked up an injury during the 0-0 draw with AS Monaco…

arts.ttl: Manchester United handed boost in Angel Gomes pursuit
arts.sum: Angel Gomes’ (24) future is up in the air. Since joining Lille OSC from formative club Manchester United back in 2020, he has flourished. His development has now been recognised,…

arts.ttl: La Liga wants Barcelona v Atletico in Miami
arts.sum: Barcelona's league fixture against Atletico Madrid in December could be staged in Miami - with La Liga officials hopeful that Fifa will approve the plan.

arts.ttl: Atlético Madrid table offer for Baye Coulibaly
arts.sum: La Liga giants Atlético Madrid have tabled an offering offer for young midfielder Baye Coulibaly. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, who has on Monday evening provided an insight…

arts.ttl: La Liga President confirms they are ‘working to dissolve’ Atletico Madrid fan group following Madrid derby
arts.sum: La Liga President Javier Tebas has declared that the league body is actively working against the Atletico Madrid ultra group Frente Atletico, who have links to the far right and are widely credited for some of the frustrating goings on at the Metropolitano in recent years.
